scripts.dev:backend: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; concurrently "pnpm --filter gateway run dev" "DATABASE_URL=$USER_DB_URL pnpm --filter user-service run dev" "DATABASE_URL=$EVENT_DB_URL pnpm --filter event-service run dev" "DATABASE_URL=$BOOKING_DB_URL pnpm --filter booking-service run dev" "DATABASE_URL=$INVENTORY_DB_URL pnpm --filter inventory-service run dev" "DATABASE_URL=$PAYMENT_DB_URL pnpm --filter payment-service run dev" "pnpm --filter notification-service run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm --filter ticketflow-frontend run dev"
